execute_scale.label: Scale damage by target missing HP
execute_scale.desc: Power scales up to (1 + scaleAmount)x as target HP drops.

pierce.label: Ignore part of target Defense
pierce.desc: Defense is multiplied by (1 - defReduction) before damage calc.

lifesteal_strong.label: Lifesteal a portion of damage dealt
lifesteal_strong.desc: Heal user for lifestealPct of damage dealt.

lifesteal_full.label: Lifesteal full damage dealt
lifesteal_full.desc: Heal user for lifestealPct of damage dealt.

cleanse_self.label: Cleanse self — all statuses + stat penalties
cleanse_self.desc: Removes all statuses and resets ATK/DEF/SPD mods on the user.

force_swap.label: Force-swap target active creature
force_swap.desc: Yanks the target out and swaps in their bench (if available).

thorn_soaking.label: Soak attackers that hit you
thorn_soaking.desc: Attackers receive Soaking when they damage you.

burn_stacking.label: Burn (stacking) — extends duration each use
burn_stacking.desc: Each consecutive use extends burn turns by extendTurns (min minTurns).

soaking_double.label: Apply multiple stacks of Soaking
soaking_double.desc: Applies stacks soaking for turns turns.

cursed_synergy.label: Bonus damage if target is already Cursed
cursed_synergy.desc: Power is multiplied by powerMult against cursed targets.
